title: Cinatra WP/Drupal assistant — content-edit action round-trip (v1)
description: Result of one assistant content-edit action tool call (drupal_content_editor_run / wordpress_content_editor_run). Either a STRUCTURED edit ({ nodeId|postId, changes: [{field, before, after}] }) or a TEXT fallback ({ result: <text> }) when the agent's reply was not structured. Cinatra maps a structured result's `changes` array to the `fields` key of the `changes` SSE frame (see sse-event.schema.json) before sending it to the bundle; identity ids are String()-coerced at that boundary.

nodeId.description: Drupal node id the edit targets (Drupal tool only).

postId.description: WordPress post id the edit targets (WordPress tool only).
